summary: Iteration 9: Verified all new features from UI restructuring - unified Dashboard (stats + clients table), simplified sidebar (removed Clienti/Articoli), Article History in GeneratorPage, GSC redirect_uri fix, SERP retry logic. All 10 backend tests passed. All frontend flows working. Fixed minor stats display bug (field name mismatch).
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Admin login returns token and role=admin
Backend: GET /api/clients - Returns list of clients with totale_articoli
Backend: GET /api/stats/overview - Returns dashboard statistics (total_clients, total_articles, published_articles)
Backend: GET /api/gsc/status - Returns redirect_uri for OAuth setup
Backend: POST /api/serp/analyze-full - Returns competitors with retry logic (3 attempts, User-Agent rotation)
Backend: POST /api/articles/simple-generate - Works for admin with client_id
Backend: GET /api/articles?client_id - Returns articles for client (used by Article History)
Backend: GET /api/users - Returns users list (3 users)
Frontend: Login with admin@seoengine.it / admin123 works
Frontend: Dashboard is UNIFIED - shows stats (1 client, 6 articles, 4 published) AND clients table on same page
Frontend: Sidebar admin has ONLY: Dashboard, Utenti, Activity Log (NO Clienti, NO Articoli)
Frontend: Click on client row navigates to /clients/{id} (Generator page)
Frontend: Generator page has 5-step wizard (Strategia, Analisi SERP, Dati GSC, Prompt, Genera)
Frontend: Article History ('Storico Articoli') button visible at bottom of Generator page
Frontend: Article History panel opens and shows articles when clicked
Frontend: Users page accessible via sidebar - shows 3 users
Frontend: Activity Log page accessible via sidebar - shows 28 operations, 13 successes, 0 errors, 3 WP publications

bug_fixed.description: Dashboard stats were showing 0 for articles because field names didn't match between API and frontend
bug_fixed.root_cause: API returns total_clients, total_articles, published_articles but frontend expected clients_count, articles_count, published_count
bug_fixed.fix: Updated DashboardPage.jsx lines 141-143 to check both field name formats

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 verified: 1) Dashboard is now UNIFIED - shows stats row AND clients table on same page, 2) Sidebar simplified - admin sees only Dashboard/Utenti/Activity Log (no separate Clienti or Articoli pages), 3) Article History (Storico Articoli) moved to bottom of GeneratorPage as collapsible button, 4) GSC status endpoint returns redirect_uri for OAuth configuration, 5) SERP scraping has retry logic with 3 attempts and User-Agent rotation. Fixed bug: Dashboard stats were showing 0 due to field name mismatch (total_articles vs articles_count) - fixed in DashboardPage.jsx.

unified_dashboard.description: Stats row + Clients table on same /dashboard page

article_history_in_generator.behavior: Collapsible button, shows article list when clicked
